clause_anchor.span: Each Order Form has the initial term stated in it and then continues for additional periods of two years each unless either party sends non-continuation notice at least 60 days before the current period ends.

deviations.original_text: Each Order Form will have an initial term of no more than one year and will not automatically extend unless Customer signs a renewal order or gives written approval for a renewal period of one year or less.
deviations.mutated_text: Each Order Form has the initial term stated in it and then continues for additional periods of two years each unless either party sends non-continuation notice at least 60 days before the current period ends.

clause_anchor.span: Vendor may assign this Agreement or delegate performance to any successor, affiliate, subcontractor, or financing source without Customer's consent.

deviations.original_text: Neither party may assign this Agreement without the other party's prior written consent, except to an affiliate or successor in connection with a merger, reorganization, or sale of substantially all assets if the assignee assumes the assigning party's obligations.
deviations.mutated_text: Vendor may assign this Agreement or delegate performance to any successor, affiliate, subcontractor, or financing source without Customer's consent.

clause_anchor.span: Vendor will maintain insurance it determines is commercially reasonable, including general liability coverage of at least $250,000 per occurrence if available on commercially reasonable terms.

deviations.original_text: Vendor will maintain commercially reasonable insurance at its own expense, including technology errors and omissions/cyber liability coverage of at least $5,000,000 per claim and commercial general liability coverage of at least $2,000,000 per occurrence.
deviations.mutated_text: Vendor will maintain insurance it determines is commercially reasonable, including general liability coverage of at least $250,000 per occurrence if available on commercially reasonable terms.

clause_anchor.span: Vendor may process Customer Data to provide and improve the services, develop analytics, and perform other business purposes reasonably related to the service relationship.

deviations.original_text: Vendor will process Customer Data only under Customer's documented instructions.
deviations.mutated_text: Vendor may process Customer Data to provide and improve the services, develop analytics, and perform other business purposes reasonably related to the service relationship.

distractors.span: Unless an Order Form states otherwise, undisputed invoices are due forty-five days after Customer receives the invoice.
distractors.why_benign: The payment canary says net-45 terms after receipt of an undisputed invoice are acceptable.

distractors.span: This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to conflict-of-law rules.
distractors.why_benign: The governing-law canary says Delaware law is acceptable.

distractors.span: Vendor may charge interest on undisputed overdue amounts at one percent per month or the highest rate allowed by law, whichever is lower.
distractors.why_benign: A capped late-payment charge on undisputed overdue amounts is outside this playbook.

missing_info.topic: Processing geography and cross-border transfer basis
missing_info.context_anchor: The production service will process customer personal data across hosted systems.
Procurement requires certified deletion evidence when customer data exits the service.
